3200120.name: Tornado - Caballo del Zorro
3200120.description:
Step into the horseshoes of Tornado, the legendary steed of Zorro, in this lighthearted 2D action-platformer. Race, leap, and kick your way through vibrant handcrafted worlds inspired by historical Spanish California. Combining fast-paced momentum-driven traversal, clever stealth, and a dash of swashbuckling humor, Tornado – Caballo del Zorro offers a fresh twist on classic side-scrolling adventures.

Your journey takes you from bustling villages to sun-scorched deserts and candle-lit haciendas, outsmarting a cast of quirky villains from a corrupt colonial regime. With each daring escape, you’ll unlock new abilities, uncover secrets, and bring hope to those oppressed — all without ever dismounting.

Key Features

  • A Playable Horse Hero – Control Tornado with a unique set of moves: wall climbs, long leaps, powerful kicks, and acrobatic dashes.

  • Momentum-Driven Platforming – Master tight, fluid controls designed for speed and flow.

  • Stealth & Distraction – Outsmart enemies with cunning tricks and environmental interactions.

  • Hand-Crafted Pixel Art – Explore richly detailed environments bursting with color and character.

  • Story-Driven Campaign – Meet original, humorous characters across a swashbuckling tale.

  • Boss Battles – Face off against eccentric villains with unique patterns and personalities.

  • Progression & Secrets – Unlock new abilities and gear through exploration and clever play.

  • Cinematic Flair – Experience a whimsical yet adventurous tone, brought to life by expressive animation and a flamenco-inspired soundtrack.

Whether you’re here for the action, the puzzles, or the charm of being gaming’s most charismatic horse, Tornado – Caballo del Zorro promises a ride you won’t forget.
3200120.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 匈牙利语
